query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isAvailable, p.isInStock, p.isActive, p.availableInstore, p.availableDelivery, p.availableAtPalladium, p.availableAtTnagar, p.subcategoryId, sc.name as scName, sc.isActive as scActive, sc.availableInstore as scInstore, sc.availableDelivery as scDelivery, sc.availableAtPalladium as scPalladium, sc.availableAtTnagar as scTnagar FROM products p JOIN subcategories sc ON p.subcategoryId = sc.id WHERE p.name = 'Omunoodles'
